description_long: This is a modern outdoor chaise with a rectangular silhouette, featuring a woven rattan-style frame in a dark gray color. The seat and backrest are fitted with four thick, plush, off-white cushions, two for the seat and two for the back, providing ample comfort. The backrest is straight and slightly reclined, with a subtle seam dividing the two back cushions. Both armrests are broad and flat, matching the woven texture of the main frame. The base is solid and boxy, with no visible legs, giving the piece a grounded and sturdy appearance. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for patios, parks, or urban outdoor lounges.
description: A contemporary outdoor chaise with a dark gray woven rattan frame and plush off-white cushions, featuring broad armrests and a boxy silhouette. The design is minimalist and comfortable, ideal for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the chaise, two seat cushions, two back cushions, and both broad armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight, slightly reclined backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the woven rattan back panel and the tops of the back cushions, with no visible legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest and cushion thickness from the other side.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, moderately high, and divided into two equal sections by a vertical seam, each section padded with a thick, off-white cushion. The backrest has a clean, minimalist look with no visible decorative elements or tufting.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, which are broad, flat, and covered in the same woven rattan material as the frame.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the base is a continuous, boxy structure that extends to the ground, fully wrapped in woven rattan.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid off-white with a smooth, unpatterned surface, and the cushions appear to be made of a weather-resistant fabric.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are four cushions: two large seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of similar size and thickness, arranged side by side to cover the seating and backrest areas completely.
